Uses of Package
fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels

Packages that use fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels
Package
Description
fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel
 
fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels
 
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels used by fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel
    Class
    Description
    FooterLeftPanel
    Creates the bottom panel of the LeftPanel, containing navigation buttons (Prev/Next).
    ImageSourcePanel
    Creates the top panel of the LeftPanel, containing image status, current image management buttons and current parameters management buttons.
    MorphologyPanel
    Panel for the Binary Mask Refinement step of the pipeline.
    ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
    Provides particle analysis setup.
    PreprocessingPanel
    Creates the middle panel of the LeftPanel, containing preprocessing controls (contrast enhancement and median filter).
    ThresholdingPanel
    The panel handling the Segmentation / Thresholding step.
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels used by fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels
    Class
    Description
    HistogramPanel
    A custom Swing component that draws an image histogram.
